THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, JESSICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINSNER, MICHAEL $6.79 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $56.79, DEFENDANT DID NOT AGREE TO PAY FOR MAID. HOWEVER, SMALL BALANCE IS OWED FOR OTHER EXPENSES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
